questions.text: What is the primary purpose of a software framework?
choices: To compile source code into machine code
To provide a foundation and standard way to build and deploy applications
To write code for the developer automatically

questions.text: Which of the following is a popular front-end JavaScript framework/library?
What architectural pattern is commonly used by UI frameworks like Spring MVC and Ruby on Rails?
Which framework is primarily used for building iOS applications?
In the context of frameworks, what does 'Inversion of Control' (IoC) mean?
choices: The database controls the application flow
The user has full control over the application state
The framework calls your custom code, rather than your code calling the framework
Developers write code without using libraries

questions.text: Which Python framework is known for its 'batteries-included' approach to web development?
What is React Native primarily used for?
choices: Building native iOS apps using Swift
Building cross-platform mobile apps using JavaScript
